metadata.note: Archetype A (target-centric): primary_target=ASIA-NORKOREA, participants {NORKOREA, RUSSIA, UKRAINE, BELARUS}. Mirror of the China atomic: the Russia/Belarus/Ukraine NAMES are the discriminators that separate this axis from north_korea_china_patronage (measured co-occurrence between the two axes is 3 titles). Generic 'troops'/'soldiers'/'arms' deliberately EXCLUDED -- with only a DPRK target gate they would match USFK troop stories and the missile atomic. Putin, Lavrov, Shoigu and Lukashenko are own-side principals here (Russia and Belarus are parties to this FN), not third-party leaders.

bundle.term: Russia (the discriminating name) and its principals
Belarus (the third leg of the axis)
